Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Cross-Defendant's Motion for Relief from Default is GRANTED. Relief from default is mandatory if the application is accompanied by an attorney affidavit attesting to his mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or neglect unless the court finds that the default was not in fact caused by those actions.
